title: Config Reprovision Audit Event
description: Kafka audit event emitted for tenant config identifier-map generation and reprovision execution. Topic name is implementation-defined but must follow the platform audit pipeline conventions.

operation_type.description: Logical operation that produced the event

correlation_id.description: Correlation id shared with the HTTP request and reprovision result

source_tenant_id.description: Source tenant identifier extracted from the artifact

actor_id.description: Identity of the actor initiating the request

format_version.description: Artifact format version validated before the operation

dry_run.description: True only for the reprovision operation when it runs in simulation mode

domain_summary.description: Optional per-domain summary for reprovision requests

identifier_map_hash.description: SHA-256 digest of the final identifier map used or proposed

artifact_checksum.description: Digest of the artifact payload or canonicalized artifact envelope
